task_completion.description: The docker-compose.yml file is opened or its contents are displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like VS Code, nano, vim) showing `/home/ga/ecommerce-platform/docker-compose.yml` or terminal output displaying the file contents.

task_completion.description: Base services (postgres and redis) remain without any profiles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the docker-compose.yml file, the `postgres` and `redis` service definitions do NOT contain a `profiles:` section.

task_completion.description: The frontend profile is assigned to nginx and storefront.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `nginx` and `storefront` service definitions contain a `profiles:` section that includes `frontend`.

task_completion.description: The backend profile is assigned to api and worker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `api` and `worker` service definitions contain a `profiles:` section that includes `backend`.

task_completion.description: The debug profile is assigned to test-runner and prometheus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `test-runner` and `prometheus` service definitions contain a `profiles:` section that includes `debug`.

task_completion.description: The full profile is assigned to all non-base services.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `profiles:` section for `nginx`, `storefront`, `api`, `worker`, `test-runner`, and `prometheus` all include `full` in addition to their specific profiles (e.g., `profiles: ["frontend", "full"]` or a bulleted list).
Attributes like `image:`, `ports:`, and `depends_on:` are still present in the service definitions and appear unmodified.

integrity.description: The agent modified the actual docker-compose.yml file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path in the editor or terminal commands matches `/home/ga/ecommerce-platform/docker-compose.yml`.

integrity.description: The added profiles use valid YAML syntax.
integrity.visual_evidence: The `profiles:` key is correctly indented under the service name, and the profile names are formatted as a valid YAML list.

integrity.description: The agent edited the existing file rather than creating a new one from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file contains the original complex configurations (like specific port numbers, image names, and depends_on relations) rather than simplified mock data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/ecommerce-platform/docker-compose.yml. Base services (postgres, redis) must have NO profile. The frontend profile includes nginx and storefront. The backend profile includes api and worker. The debug profile includes test-runner and prometheus. The full profile includes all 6 non-base services (nginx, storefront, api, worker, test-runner, prometheus). Existing configurations (ports, images, depends_on) must remain intact.
